rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FRANK DIHARTCE
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (226 2nd Avenue, San Francisco, Ca 94118)
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Purchaser (BFAM Investments, LLC) has not been given notice. 2) Re-appraisal has not been filed. 3) Petitioner alleged that there was no bond before sale (Item 6a); however, $369,000 bond was required and filed. It appears that $1,813,000 additional bond will be required on the original bid ($2,181,375 - $369,000, rounded up to nearest $1,000). 4) Pertinent terms of sale need to be provided rather than simply attaching the sale contract. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Information regarding appearance by CourtCall can be found in the 11th amended general order.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Determination Of Entitlement To Estate Distribution

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ALFRED JOSHUA DIXON
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 09/12/2022 (no earlier date available). 1) Item 2a of the amended petition must be checked if the will is sought to be admitted. 2) Item 2b(2) must be checked if the will is sought to be admitted. 3) Item 4 must be checked unless the will precludes IAEA administration. 4) Item 5a(2)(b): Please provide the name and date of death of the deceased spouse. 5) At least one box must be checked at item 7b if the decedent had a predeceased spouse. 6) Attachment 8 must include the proposed personal representative identified in the amended petition. 7) No DE-147 form is on file for the proposed personal representative identified in the amended petition. 8) No DE-147S form is on file for the proposed personal representative identified in the amended petition. 9) No consent to serve signed by the proposed personal representative identified in the amended petition is on file. LRSF 14.24. 10) No consent signed by Gloria Thomas to the appointment of the proposed personal representative identified in the amended petition is on file. 11) The will does not appear to have been signed by the decedent. Is the will valid? 12) Notice must be given to the person who filed a request for special notice absent a waiver. Note: Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF CHARLES T GRATIOT
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: continued to 8/29/22 to address the following issues: no proof of publication on file as of this date; no proposed order lodged or provided to the examiner as required by local rules; #8 of the petition must list and identify the heirs, and if they are second generation (nieces and nephews), the deceased ancestor from whom they claim must be identified by name, relationship to decedent, and date of death (LRSF 14.18.C.#.); a supplement, signed and verified by the petitioner, must be filed explaining why a probate is being opened when assets are below the small estate limit. filing deadline in order to avoid an automatic continuance is noon on 8/22/22. please note, examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.
